birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Journal of Raptor Research, 51(4), 409–416. Cooper's hawks originating from Northern California do generally migrate south, mostly wintering in Mexico though sometimes covering up to to Central America. In Lansing, Michigan, evidence has been found of individual Cooper's hawks being annually devoted to the same wintering grounds, presumably due to their high quality.Sanz, J
